name: Lime Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in boiling water until fully set.
2. Cut each slice of pineapple into four pieces and halve the cherries.
3. Pour a small portion of gelatin into the mold and place a cherry half in the center.
4. Arrange sections of orange, grapefruit, pineapple, and cherries in a design.
5. Cover with a layer of gelatin. Repeat until the mold is filled.
6. Chill until firm, then unmold.
7. Garnish with lettuce hearts and melon balls.
8. Serve with mayonnaise. Makes 6 servings.
